queries.question: List all comments for the 'First Article', along with the copy editor.
queries.sql: Select Copy_Editor, CommentText from Articles Join Comments on Comments.ArticleID=Articles.ArticleID where Title = 'First Article'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?copy_editor ?commenttext WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?comments a :Comments .
  ?comments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Copy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?comments p:CommentText ?commenttext .
  ?articles p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "First Article")
}

queries.question: List all comments for the 'First Article', along with the managing editor.
queries.sql: Select Managing_Editor, CommentText from Articles Join Comments on Comments.ArticleID=Articles.ArticleID where Title = 'First Article'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?managing_editor ?commenttext WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?comments a :Comments .
  ?comments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Managing_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?comments p:CommentText ?commenttext .
  ?articles p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "First Article")
}

queries.question: Show me the titles and descriptions for all advertisements costing > 50000 and their editors
queries.sql: Select Title, Managing_Editor, Description From Articles Join AdAssignments on AdAssignments.ArticleID = Articles.ArticleID  Join Advertisements on Advertisements.AdID = AdAssignments.AdID where Price > 50000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?managing_editor ?description WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?adassignments a :AdAssignments .
  ?adassignments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?advertisements a :Advertisements .
  ?adassignments p:hasAdvertisements ?advertisements .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Managing_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?advertisements p:Description ?description .
  ?advertisements p:Price ?price_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?price_f) > 50000)
}

queries.question: Show me all the comments relating to articles with the title 'First Article' and who was the editor
queries.sql: Select Managing_Editor, Copy_Editor, CommentText from Articles Join Comments on Comments.ArticleID=Articles.ArticleID where Title = 'First Article'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?managing_editor ?copy_editor ?commenttext WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?comments a :Comments .
  ?comments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?articles p:Managing_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?articles p:Copy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?comments p:CommentText ?commenttext .
  ?articles p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "First Article")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all the comments relating to articles with the title 'First Article' and who was the editor
Show me the titles and descriptions for all advertisements costing > 50000 and their editors
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?title ?managing_editor ?copy_editor ?description WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?adassignments a :AdAssignments .
  ?adassignments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?advertisements a :Advertisements .
  ?adassignments p:hasAdvertisements ?advertisements .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Managing_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?articles p:Copy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?advertisements p:Description ?description .
  ?advertisements p:Price ?price_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?price_f) > 50000)
} }
  component: { SELECT ?title ?managing_editor ?description WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?adassignments a :AdAssignments .
  ?adassignments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?advertisements a :Advertisements .
  ?adassignments p:hasAdvertisements ?advertisements .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Managing_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?advertisements p:Description ?description .
  ?advertisements p:Price ?price_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?price_f) > 50000)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?copy_editor ?description WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?adassignments a :AdAssignments .
  ?adassignments p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?advertisements a :Advertisements .
  ?adassignments p:hasAdvertisements ?advertisements .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:Copy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?advertisements p:Description ?description .
  ?advertisements p:Price ?price_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?price_f) > 50000)
} }
}
